test.name: Open google.com

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: InvalidArgumentException: Message: Malformed URL: URL constructor: chrome is not a valid URL. Stacktrace: RemoteError@chrome://remote/content/shared/RemoteError.sys.mjs:8:8 WebDriverError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:192:5 InvalidArgumentError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:383:5 GeckoDriver.prototype.navigateTo@chrome://remote/content/marionette/driver.sys.mjs:837:11
